rulings.Case Title: RE SOCORRO S. ARTATES -TRUST 1992
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Concerning Internal Affairs Of The Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/13/2021. 1) Notice was not given to all required parties and the filed notice of hearings on page 2 #5 do not show a copy of the petition served. [Probate Code 17203]. Probate Code 17203 (b) At least 30 days before the time set for hearing on the petition, the petitioner shall cause notice of the hearing and a copy of the petition to be served in the manner provided in Chapter 4 (commencing with Section 413.10) of Title 5 of Part 2 of the Code of Civil Procedure on any person, other than a trustee or beneficiary, whose right, title, or interest would be affected by the petition and who does not receive notice pursuant to subdivision (a). The court may not shorten the time for giving notice under this subdivision. An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53] 2) Petitioner alleges on page 12 of the petition "there are no minors". Please provide legal authority for providing notice to individuals C/O David C. Artates and C/O Ruth C. Artates-Rezaie. 3) The verification page [page 6] attached to the 01/04/2021 P&A is not legible. 4) The 01/04/2021 Petitioners' Reply to John Artates Response to Petition is not verified by petitioners. [CRC 7.103].

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT LEE QUINN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/5/2021. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7].

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LIZA DENISE SWIFT LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Former Trustee'S Accounting
rulings.Rulings: continued to 3/29/21. there is an existing case number for this trust #302978, under which another case has already been consolidated. counsel must file an ex parte petition to consolidate this case with the existing case numbers, and order all subsequent filings be under the original case number. note-->dismissal of a petition in probate does not close out a case number. deadline for getting that consolidation order on file is noon on 3/22/21. by that same deadline, a file stamped copy of the petition and a revised order with the original case number must be provided to the examiner in Room 202.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DANIELSEN-WALKER REVOCABLE TRUST DATED OCTOBER 12, 2004 AS RESTATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Assets Are Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/22/21. Petitioner alleges that he and Decedent resided in San Francisco at the date of her death and that his attorneys have offices in San Francisco. Neither of these sufficiently address whether venue is proper in San Francisco. Prior to a full review of the petition, a Memo of Points and Authorities will need to be filed alleging where in San Francisco the trust is principally administered at and allege what trust activities are performed there. Filed stamp copy to be delivered to Room 202 at least 2 weeks prior.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLORIA LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 9/6/2022. A petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration must be filed at least one week before 9/6/2022. Appearance will be required on 9/6/2022 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL BRAUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required in light of Michelle DiPrisco's objection filed on 01/28/2021. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.
